        "annotationModelVersion": "GPT-4.5",

        "evidenceVersion": "v1.0",
        "annotationLanguage": "zh-CN",
        "confidence": 0.85,
        "primaryMediaType": "MUSIC"
      },
      "semantic": {
        "summary": "歌曲以轻快民歌曲风描绘小媳妇回娘家的喜悦情景，朱明瑛甜润的嗓音和生动演绎使该曲成为改革开放初期经典流行作品。歌词围绕民俗习惯展开，旋律简单易记，传递出对家庭团聚和传统亲情的温暖向往。",
        "themes": [
          "家庭",
          "亲情",
          "传统民俗",
          "喜悦"
        ],
        "keywords": [
          "回娘家",
          "小媳妇",
          "民歌",
          "朱明瑛",
          "轻快",
          "改革开放",
          "流行歌曲"
        ],
        "core_experience": "听众在轻快旋律和甜润歌声中体验温暖、怀旧且轻松愉悦的情感，唤起对家庭、传统习俗的亲近与认同。",
        "experience_introduction": "作品通过简单重复的民歌曲调和生动演唱，直接将小媳妇回娘家的欢快场景投射到听众心中，不设任何认知障碍，营造出极易共鸣的温情氛围，使听众仿佛参与了一次传统家庭团聚。"
      },
      "experience_vector": {

      },
      "media_vector": {
        "music_vector": {
          "genre": "流行/民歌",
          "tempo": 0.72,
          "energy": 0.60,
          "vocal_style": "甜润女声独唱",
          "instrumentation": "民乐与流行乐队",
          "production_style": "1980年代流行编曲",
          "lyrical_theme": "回娘家喜悦",
          "emotional_scene": "欢快温暖",
          "cultural_context": "改革开放初期流行歌曲"
        }
      },
      "vector_facts": [
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.passion", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "歌曲表达的热情较为温和，更多是温馨轻快而非强烈激情。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.healing", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "温暖旋律带来轻微抚慰感，但非主要设计目标。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.awe", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "缺少宏大或令人敬畏的结构与内容，敬畏感极低。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.nostalgia", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "民歌曲调和传统主题强烈唤起对旧日习俗的怀旧情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.reflection", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "作品直接叙事，很少促使听众深度反思。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.romance", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "主要围绕亲情与传统，浪漫爱情元素几乎不出现。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.tension", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "整首歌曲毫无紧张或冲突气氛。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.warmth", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "歌词、旋律和嗓音共同营造出浓厚的家庭温暖感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.loneliness", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "主题是团聚和喜悦，完全排除孤独情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.hope", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "回娘家的期待和对家庭幸福的展望带来温和的希望感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.abstractness", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "语言和寓意直接明了，无抽象符号或隐喻。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.complexity", "score": 0.08, "explanation": "旋律和歌词结构简单，认知复杂度极低。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.depth_of_thought", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不涉及哲学或深层思辨，仅描述日常生活场景。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.logical_structure", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "歌曲段落重复，无严谨的逻辑推理链条。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.novelty", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "在1980年代初加入流行编曲元素相对新颖，但整体曲式传统。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.exploration", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "内容固定在回娘家这一熟悉场景，未拓展新领域。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.ambiguity", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "歌词表意清晰，几乎不存在多重解读空间。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.predictability", "score": 0.90, "explanation": "重复性旋律和常规叙事使发展高度可预测。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.information_density", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "短小歌曲承载的信息量有限，重在情绪传递。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.learning_value", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "听众能略微了解传统民俗，但知识增量很少。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.personal_scale", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "完全围绕小媳妇的个人经历和情感展开。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.relationship_scale", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "涉及夫妻、父母等家庭关系，但刻画不深。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.social_scale", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "只在背景中暗示农村社区，不聚焦社会结构。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.civilization_scale", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不涉及文明或历史跨度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.cosmic_scale", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "完全没有宇宙或宏大视野。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.time_span", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "歌曲只浓缩了回娘家这一天或短暂瞬间。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.fantasy_level", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "完全写实，无任何幻想元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.happiness", "score": 0.92, "explanation": "明快节奏和喜悦歌词使幸福感贯穿全曲。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.sadness", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "仅可能在思念娘家的细微处带一丝伤感，几乎不察。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.loneliness", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "团聚场景排斥孤独。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.warmth", "score": 0.88, "explanation": "亲情主题和温柔音色塑造出强烈暖意。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.fear", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无任何惊悚或恐惧暗示。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.tension", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "全程松弛，无压迫感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.awe", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "未营造崇高或令人战栗的体验。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.nostalgia", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "民歌味道和传统习俗直击怀旧情感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.hope", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "对未来回娘家生活的愉快期许注入温和希望。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.melancholy", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "几乎没有忧伤底色，仅乐景中可能存留淡淡感怀。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.anger", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "完全不存在愤怒情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.peace", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "愉悦中带有安宁感，但曲调活泼，并非全然平静。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.beauty", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "旋律优美，人声悦耳，带来中等偏上的美感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.minimalism", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "编制简练，重复结构突出，符合极简表达。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.luxury", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "平民化题材和朴素编曲，无奢华感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.darkness", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "色调明亮，无一丝黑暗质感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.brightness", "score": 0.92, "explanation": "音色、节奏和情绪都非常明亮。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.dreamlike", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "没有梦幻缥缈的处理，全部脚踏实地。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.mystery", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "毫无神秘色彩，完全敞开。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.experimental", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "编曲虽融合流行元素，但整体保守常规。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.classical", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "民歌根源赋予其一定传统古典韵味。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.modern", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "电子乐器点缀和流行编排带来轻微时代感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.plot_complexity", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "仅讲述回娘家一件小事，无复杂情节。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_depth", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "小媳妇形象单薄，仅呈现喜悦一面。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_growth", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "没有人物成长弧线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.world_building", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "利用现实语境，未构建独特世界。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.nonlinear_structure", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "线性时间叙述，非常直接。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.slow_immersion", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "长度较短，沉浸感有限，但温暖氛围仍可让人稍许投入。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.action_intensity", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无动作场面或激烈行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.conflict_intensity", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "毫无冲突。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.philosophical_depth", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不探讨哲学命题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.individualism", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "以个人视角叙述，但核心是家庭归属。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.collectivism", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "围绕家庭集体和传统习俗展开。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.family", "score": 0.95, "explanation": "回娘家的主题使家庭成为绝对焦点。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.friendship", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "不涉及友情描写。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.love", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "夫妻关系隐含其中，但非强调重点。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.community", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "农村邻里氛围略作铺垫。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.competition", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "完全不含竞争。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.cooperation", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "家庭内部互相配合，间接体现合作。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.power_relationship", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "没有权力结构描写。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.identity", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "小媳妇身份带来一定角色意识，但未深入探讨。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.freedom", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "回娘家是一次释放，暗示短暂自由，但整体服从家庭秩序。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.order", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "遵循传统习俗和家庭安排。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.truth", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不追求哲理真理，只是生活写实。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.beauty", "score": 0.50, "explanation": "旋律和人声之美是核心吸引力之一。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.achievement", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不涉及事业或成就追求。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.justice", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无正义议题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.sacrifice", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "没有牺牲行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.self_exploration", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "几乎不探索内心深层世界。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.tradition", "score": 0.92, "explanation": "回娘家本身就是传统习俗，歌曲处处彰显民俗。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.change", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "从婆家到娘家的空间变化带来轻微变动感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.survival", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不涉及生存挑战。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.meaning", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "家庭团聚赋予生活浅层意义，但不深入。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.curiosity", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不激发探索欲。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.creation", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不具备鼓励创造的特性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.adventure", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "没有冒险元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.reflection", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "只可能引发对亲情的浅层回味。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.competition", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无竞争激励。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.social", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "易于在聚会中分享传唱，促进社交。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.discipline", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不要求纪律或自控。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.risk", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "完全无风险。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.calm", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "曲调活泼但总体情绪安适，偏向平和。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.escape", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无逃避现实的导向。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.visual_intensity", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "纯音频作品，视觉刺激极低。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.color_richness", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "依靠想象构建色彩，本身无色感设计。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.sound_intensity", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "演唱和配乐音量适中，无强烈冲击。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.rhythm_energy", "score": 0.72, "explanation": "轻快节拍带来较高节奏活力。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.atmosphere", "score": 0.78, "explanation": "欢快温暖的氛围迅速建立并维持。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.immersion", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "短小易懂易于代入，但深度沉浸受限。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.music_vector.tempo", "score": 0.72, "explanation": "中快速度推动欢快情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.music_vector.energy", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "整体能量积极但不过分亢奋。" }
      ],
      "experience_vector_summary": {
        "experience_description": "听众沉浸在轻松愉悦的民歌曲调中，感受到小媳妇回娘家的由衷欢喜，内心被温暖、怀旧和淡淡的希望包裹，整个过程毫无压力。",
        "structure_description": "歌曲采用简单重复的民谣式结构，主歌与副歌自然衔接，节拍轻快稳定。朱明瑛甜美的嗓音如同讲述一个小故事，配器上民乐与流行乐器交织，制造出明亮而亲近的声响空间。",
        "cognitive_expression": "作品几乎不要求深度思考或逻辑分析，听众只需被动接收旋律和歌词信息。高度可预测的进行方式让人认知负担极低，注意力集中在欢快的情绪和民俗画面想象上。",
        "behavioral_tendency_description": "该曲极易激发听众跟随哼唱、在亲友聚会中播放或回忆童年家庭场景，促进轻松的社交互动和对传统习俗的亲近行为。"

      },
      "supporting_evidence": [
        "歌曲以回娘家这一民间习俗作为核心叙事内容。",
        "歌词不断重复回家的喜悦和见到亲人的激动。",
        "朱明瑛用甜润而富有弹性的嗓音进行独唱。",
        "节奏轻快，大量使用切分和跳跃感强的节拍型。",
        "编曲融合了笛子、二胡等民族乐器与电子琴、吉他。",
        "整首歌时长较短，结构为常见的二段体加重复。",
        "发行于1982年，正值大陆流行音乐重新萌发的时期。",

        "歌词中出现“骑着毛驴”等充满乡土气息的具象描写。",

semantic: 摘要需高信息密度。歌曲内容：小媳妇回娘家喜悦情景，轻快民歌曲风，朱明瑛甜润嗓音，改革开放初期流行。摘要：歌曲以轻快民歌曲风描绘小媳妇回娘家的喜悦情景，通过朱明瑛甜润的嗓音和生动演绎，表现人物内心欢快与对家庭的向往，成为改革开放初期经典流行曲目。

主题：家庭、亲情、喜悦、传统习俗。关键词：回娘家、小媳妇、喜悦、民歌、朱明瑛、改革开放、流行歌曲。core_experience：听歌曲时体验到的轻松愉悦、温暖怀旧的氛围，唤起对家庭团聚和传统民俗的亲近感。

experience_vector: 体验向量。包括passion, healing, awe, nostalgia, reflection, romance, tension, warmth, loneliness, hope。这是一首轻快民歌，有温暖、怀旧、喜悦的感觉。可能passion较低，healing中等，awe低，nostalgia较高（民歌曲风勾起怀旧），reflection低，romance低，tension低，warmth高，loneliness低，hope中等。具体数值：warmth 0.8, nostalgia 0.7, hope 0.4, healing 0.3, passion 0.2, awe 0.1, reflection 0.2, romance 0.1, tension 0.0, loneliness 0.0。稍后细化。

心理学向量：需要每个维度。根据歌曲特性分析。

cognitive: abstractness低，因为是民谣叙事直接；complexity低；depth_of_thought低；logical_structure简单；novelty在当年可能有一定新意，但现在一般；exploration低；ambiguity低；predictability高；information_density低；learning_value中低，可能学到一些民俗。数值：abstractness 0.15, complexity 0.1, depth_of_thought 0.1, logical_structure 0.1, novelty 0.2 (相对当时可能有点新), exploration 0.05, ambiguity 0.05, predictability 0.9, information_density 0.15, learning_value 0.2。

worldview: personal_scale 0.8 (个人体验)，relationship_scale 0.6 (家庭关系)，social_scale 0.2，civilization_scale 0.0，cosmic_scale 0.0，time_span 0.1 (短时间)，fantasy_level 0.0。

emotion: happiness高0.9，sadness 0.05，loneliness 0.0，warmth 0.8，fear 0.0，tension 0.0，awe 0.0，nostalgia 0.7，hope 0.4，melancholy 0.0，anger 0.0，peace 0.3（平和愉悦）。注意：melancholy是新的维度，我加入。

aesthetic: beauty中等，因为民歌旋律优美，0.6；minimalism 0.7（简单配器）；luxury 0.0；darkness 0.0；brightness 0.9（明亮欢快）；dreamlike 0.1；mystery 0.0；experimental 0.0；classical 0.3（民歌传统）；modern 0.3（当时流行编曲）。

narrative dimension: 歌曲有叙事性，但作为音乐，需要从表达结构角度。plot_complexity极低，但歌曲讲述了一个小情景，可视为情节简单：0.1；character_depth 0.1；character_growth 0.0；world_building 0.0；nonlinear_structure 0.0；slow_immersion 0.1；action_intensity 0.0；conflict_intensity 0.0；philosophical_depth 0.0。但是按照规范，音乐作品解释这些维度为表达结构。可能小幅调整。鉴于歌曲叙事简单，大多数低。

social relationship: individualism 0.2，collectivism 0.6（家庭团聚，传统），family 0.9，friendship 0.1，love 0.2（夫妻情感），community 0.3，competition 0.0，cooperation 0.4，power_relationship 0.0，identity 0.3（小媳妇身份）。

value: freedom 0.3，order 0.5，truth 0.1，beauty 0.5，achievement 0.1，justice 0.0，sacrifice 0.0，self_exploration 0.1，tradition 0.9，change 0.3（回娘家是变化），survival 0.0，meaning 0.3。

behavior: curiosity 0.1，creation 0.1，adventure 0.0，reflection 0.2，competition 0.0，social 0.7，discipline 0.0，risk 0.0，calm 0.5，escape 0.0。

sensory: 音乐作品，听觉为主。visual_intensity 0.0（歌曲无画面），color_richness 0.1，sound_intensity 0.6（音量适中），rhythm_energy 0.7（轻快节奏），atmosphere 0.7（欢快气氛），immersion 0.4（容易沉浸）。但是音乐MV可能有一定视觉，原作是歌曲，视觉强度低。

media_vector: 应为music_vector。包含genre, tempo, energy, vocal_style, instrumentation, production_style, lyrical_theme, emotional_scene, cultural_context。genre: "流行/民歌"，tempo: 0.7（中快），energy: 0.6，vocal_style: "甜润女声独唱"，instrumentation: "民乐与流行乐队结合"，production_style: "1980年代流行编曲"，lyrical_theme: "回娘家喜悦"，emotional_scene: "欢快温馨"，cultural_context: "改革开放初期流行音乐"。

vector_facts: 需要为每个数值维度生成一个事实项，包括experience_vector, psychology_vector所有子维度, music_vector所有数值维度。还需要music_vector中的字符串可以不作为维度事实吗？规范要求："vector_facts必须包含experience_vector、psychology_vector每个组和选定的媒体向量的每个数值叶字段的恰好一个项目。" 所以music_vector中的字符串字段（genre, vocal_style等）不需要，只有数值字段tempo, energy需要。music_vector中有tempo, energy，其他是字符串。这样就有两个。experience_vector有10个数值，psychology_vector各组加起来很多。我们需要为每个数值字段生成dimensionPath, score, explanation。总共大约有：experience_vector 10个 + cognitive 10个 + worldview 7个 + emotion 12个 + aesthetic 10个 + narrative 9个 + social_relationship 10个 + value 12个 + behavior 10个 + sensory 6个 + music_vector的2个 = 108个。这有点多，但根据规范必须每个数值字段都有。我需要生成约108个解释。这需要仔细生成，但可以批量生成简短的。每个解释使用中文，简明描述原因。例如：dimensionPath:"experience_vector.passion", score:0.2, explanation:"歌曲表达热情程度较低，更多是温馨轻快。"。这可能需要一些时间，但必须完成。

experience_vector_summary: 需要四个字段。experience_description: "听众体验到轻快愉悦、温暖怀旧的情绪，伴随回娘家的民俗情景产生亲切感。" structure_description: "歌曲采用简单重复的民歌曲式，节奏明快，配器轻巧，朱明瑛的甜润嗓音贯穿始终，营造连贯的欢快氛围。" cognitive_expression: "作品鼓励听众轻松接受、无需深度思考，主要是感受喜悦和民俗风情，认知负荷很低。" behavioral_tendency_description: "歌曲引发听众对家庭团聚的向往、对传统习俗的回忆，可能激发社交分享和轻松愉悦的行为倾向。"

personality_affinity: 根据CPR推断。歌曲温暖怀旧，传统性强，情感外向（Fe较高），轻快感官愉悦（Se中等），认知深度低。可能Fe, Si较高，Fi, Se中等，Ni, Ne, Ti, Te较低。具体：Ni 0.1（无抽象），Ne 0.1，Ti 0.05，Te 0.05，Fi 0.3（个人喜悦），Fe 0.8（家庭情感共鸣），Si 0.8（怀旧传统），Se 0.5（听觉感官愉悦）。Big Five：openness 0.2（传统，无探索），conscientiousness 0.3（无纪律要求），extraversion 0.7（欢快外向），agreeableness 0.8（温暖亲和），neuroticism 0.2（情绪稳定）。Assertive 0.7，Turbulent 0.3（轻松自信）。

supporting_evidence: 8-15条中文事实证据。例如："歌曲以民歌曲调描绘小媳妇回娘家的场景。""歌词反复强调回家的喜悦和亲情。""朱明瑛的嗓音甜润，演唱活泼生动。""节奏轻快，配器融入民族乐器。""歌曲在改革开放初期广泛传唱。""内容围绕中国农村家庭传统习俗。""表达了对家庭温暖和团聚的向往。""曲式简单重复，易于记忆。""演唱中充满欢快情绪。""没有复杂叙事，直接呈现场景。""歌词使用方言色彩词汇。""音乐风格结合时代特征。" 尽量8-15条。

quality_control: 根据要求设置为TRAINABLE，通过各项检查。

现在构建完整的JSON。特别注意：personality_affinity必须包含所有八个大写字母和五个大五人格和Assertive/Turbulent。以及processingState。
